headline: The Dealmaking Gamble Threatening Estée Lauder’s Turnaround
summary: Having skin in the game won’t always stop family founders from making bad decisions.  Estée Lauder’s  minority investors might soon find that out the hard way.  Shares in the U.S. cosmetics giant have slumped 16% since management said it is in talks to buy Spanish fragrance company Puig.
